examples: It is also the seventh largest city proper in the world, a megacity.
A world city is a city with a global impact – and thus not necessarily synonymous with a megacity .
In the competition between the megacity and the holy city, Upadhyay says, "Delhi is winning, of course."
China's capital is now a megacity of almost 20 million, its streets hectic and clogged.
As in any major city (or megacity), there is no single profile of a resident of Kibera.
